Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The time is upon us to demonstrate outstanding sportsmanship! May the best runner win![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}How are you feeling? Think you got this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 0 25 25}Since this is your first time, let me give you some advice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And the biggest enemy out there... is yourself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 22 0 105 25 25 20}But don't worry, man! Everyone's like that in the beginning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 0 25 25}Well, this is your first time, so let me give you some advice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And the biggest enemy out there... is yourself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You got it! Leave the cheering to me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}It should help get you energized for the race.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Since this is your first big event, let me give you some advice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}And the biggest enemy out there... is yourself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Whoa! Holy crap, he's fast! Go, go, goooooo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}That was amazing, {f 4 1}-kun! I can't believe it's your first time competing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}On top of that, this was your fastest time yet![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Looks like all your hard work paid off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Even with your incredible performance, that guy still won.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You mean Hayase, right? They say he blows everyone out of the water in every competition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 22 0 105 25 25 20}I thought people were exaggerating, but geez, he's insane![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Could sure use someone like him on our team...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Plenty enough to make me sweat a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Hey, I know this is weird all of a sudden...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But would you want to hang out sometime?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 115 0 25 25}You still need to work on your technique, but I feel like you've got potential.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 22 0 115 33 25 20}Maybe you could help push me to test my limits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}You still need to work on your technique, but I feel like you've got potential.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 22 0 115 33 25 20}Maybe you could help push me to test my limits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I usually grab a bite to eat at the {f 0 1 2}strip mall{f 0 1 27} in Iwatodai {f 0 1 2}after school{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Stop by sometime if you feel like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Wow, {f 4 1}-kun! Hayase must really see you as a worthy rival![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}If you see him again, tell him this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 22 0 106 24 25 21}By the way, wasn't that Niimura guy from Third High supposed to be pretty good too? He never showed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Yeah, I was talking to some of the guys from his school. Apparently they couldn't get a hold of him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}They even went out to check his house, but he wasn't there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}So he's gone missing!? Did he run away from home? Maybe he was afraid of going up against Hayase...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Or, wait... Do you think it's because of that Apathy Syndrome thing...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}No idea... Hope he shows up again soon in one piece.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}{f 4 21 106 11}Anyway, now's not the time to get down in the dumps. Our school did great today, after all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to head back with my teammates.[n]{f 1 1}
